module.name: no-shell-command-construction
module.description: Disallow shell command construction through subprocess APIs.

scenarios.name: should allow argument-vector subprocess calls and approved wrappers
scenarios.given: code using spawn or execFile with argument arrays or configured safe wrappers

scenarios.name: should report shell string execution APIs
scenarios.given: code using exec, execSync, execa.command, execaCommand, or configured shell functions

scenarios.name: should report dynamic spawn commands and shell mode
scenarios.given: code passing interpolated or concatenated command strings to spawn or enabling shell true
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the spawn call
